---
title: "Student view - Student Summary"
format:
    dashboard:
        scrolling: True
        theme:
            - cosmo
            - theme.scss
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| include: false
import subprocess, sys, base64
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

# (Re)generate the rich HTML mockup from latest data + code; capture_output
# silences the builder's prints so they don't leak into the dashboard.
subprocess.run([sys.executable, "src/build_student_summary.py"],
               check=True, capture_output=True)

# Encode the generated HTML so we can iframe it (isolates CSS from Quarto's
# own styles AND keeps every click handler / modal / picker working).
html_bytes = Path("notebooks/student_summary.html").read_bytes()
HTML_B64 = base64.b64encode(html_bytes).decode()
```

## Row {height=100%}

::: {.card title=""}
```{python}
#| echo: false
HTML(
    f'<iframe '
    f'  src="data:text/html;base64,{HTML_B64}" '
    f'  style="width:100%;height:100vh;border:0;display:block;background:#fff" '
    f'  title="Student Summary mockup">'
    f'</iframe>'
)
```
:::
